목적_및_맥락: 모니터링할 Airbridge 원링크/채널 선택. Grafana Multi-value Query Variable 타입으로 생성. 실험군 필터링의 핵심 변수.
SQL_쿼리:
SELECT DISTINCT signup_referral_channel
FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user`
WHERE signup_referral_channel IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(created_date, 'Asia/Seoul') >= '2026-01-01'
ORDER BY 1
개발자_주의사항: 쿼리 내 사용 시 반드시 ${referral_channels:singlequote} 형태로 삽입. :singlequote 포맷 누락 시 SQL IN절 오류 발생.

목적_및_맥락: 코호트 집계 시작일 지정. Grafana Text input Variable.
각 주에 실험군 채널에서 첫 주문한 유저 수를 파악. 모수가 너무 적으면 선행 지표의 통계적 신뢰성이 낮아지므로 200명 미만 주차는 참고용으로만 활용. 실험군 + 전체 평균 비교 표시.
판단기준: 코호트당 최소 200명 권장. 미만 시 통계 불신뢰 경고 레이블 추가 권장.
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week)  AS time,
  channel_group           AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cohort_size
FROM all_first_orders
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group

목적_및_맥락: 첫 주문 후 2일 이내에 수거(fulfillment.status = COMPLETED)가 완료된 유저 비율. 수거 완료 유저의 다음달 재이용률이 미완료 대비 약 20%p 높음. 광고 소재·랜딩과 실제 서비스 간 기대 불일치를 조기 감지하는 지표.
시각화_타입: Time series (Line) — 실험군 vs 전체 평균
판단기준: 전체 평균 대비 -5%p 이하 → 경고 (광고 타겟 미스매치 의심). Threshold 설정: -5%p에 Yellow 경고선 추가 권장.
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    o.id AS first_order_id,
    DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') AS first_order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
),
pickup_result AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    afo.cohort_week,
    afo.channel_group,
    MAX(CASE
      WHEN f.status = 'COMPLETED'
       AND DATE(f.completed_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 2 DAY)
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END) AS first_pickup_completed
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.fulfillment` f ON afo.first_order_id = f.order_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id, afo.cohort_week, afo.channel_group
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week) AS time,
  channel_group AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cohort_size,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(first_pickup_completed = 1) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 1) AS d2_pickup_completion_pct
FROM pickup_result
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group
개발자_주의사항: 코호트 성숙 조건: 2일이 경과한 코호트만 포함 (WHERE 절에 반영됨). 미성숙 코호트 포함 시 수치 왜곡 발생.

목적_및_맥락: 핵심 선행 지표. 첫 주문일로부터 7일 이내에 2번째 주문을 한 유저 비율. 다음달 재이용 그룹의 59.5%가 D+7 이내 재주문 / 미재이용 그룹은 31.5%만 재주문. 이 수치 하나만으로 30일을 기다리지 않고 캠페인 효과를 조기 판단 가능.
시각화_타입: Time series (Line) — 실험군 vs 전체 평균. Threshold 색상 설정 권장.
판단기준:
✅ 50% 이상 → 양호 (Green Threshold)
⚠️ 30~50% → 주의 (Yellow Threshold)
🚨 30% 미만 → 위험 신호 (Red Threshold)
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') AS first_order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
),
reorder_check AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    afo.cohort_week,
    afo.channel_group,
    afo.first_order_date,
    COUNTIF(
      DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') > afo.first_order_date
      AND DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 7 DAY)
      AND o2.deleted_at IS NULL
    ) > 0 AS has_reorder_d7
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2` o2
    ON afo.user_id = o2.user_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id, afo.cohort_week, afo.channel_group, afo.first_order_date
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week) AS time,
  channel_group AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cohort_size,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(has_reorder_d7) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 1) AS d7_reorder_rate_pct
FROM reorder_check
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group
개발자_주의사항: 코호트 성숙 조건: 7일이 경과한 코호트만 포함 (WHERE 절에 반영됨).

목적_및_맥락: 첫 주문 후 14일 이내 누적 2회 이상 주문한 유저 비율. 재이용 그룹 59.3% vs 미재이용 그룹 38.4% → 21%p 차이. D+7 재주문율보다 정밀하게 서비스 습관화 여부를 측정.
시각화_타입: Time series (Line) — 실험군 vs 전체 평균
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') AS first_order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
),
order_count_d14 AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    afo.cohort_week,
    afo.channel_group,
    COUNT(o2.id) AS order_count_d14
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2` o2
    ON afo.user_id = o2.user_id
    AND o2.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
    AND DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY afo.user_id, afo.cohort_week, afo.channel_group
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week) AS time,
  channel_group AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cohort_size,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(order_count_d14 >= 2) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 1) AS d14_repeat_usage_pct
FROM order_count_d14
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group

목적_및_맥락: 첫 주문 후 14일 이내 구독(subscription)을 시작한 유저 비율. 재이용 그룹 6.4% vs 미재이용 그룹 1.0% → 6배 차이. 구독 전환은 장기 리텐션의 가장 강력한 예측 인자.
시각화_타입: Time series (Line) — 실험군 vs 전체 평균. Threshold 설정 권장.
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') AS first_order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
),
subscription_check AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    afo.cohort_week,
    afo.channel_group,
    MAX(CASE
      WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL
       AND DATE(s.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
       AND DATE(s.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 14 DAY)
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END) AS subscribed_d14
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.subscription` s ON afo.user_id = s.user_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id, afo.cohort_week, afo.channel_group
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week) AS time,
  channel_group AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cohort_size,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(subscribed_d14 = 1) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 1) AS d14_subscription_rate_pct
FROM subscription_check
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group
개발자_주의사항: 코호트 성숙 조건: 14일이 경과한 코호트만 포함 (WHERE 절에 반영됨).

목적_및_맥락: 30일이 경과한 코호트에 대한 종합 품질 평가. 4개 지표(평균 주문 수·결제 발생율·리뷰 작성율·구독 전환율)를 동시에 확인. 재이용 그룹 기준값: 평균 주문수 2.21회 / 결제 발생율 68.7% / 리뷰 작성율 10.3% / 구독 전환율 6.4%.
시각화_타입: Table 패널 (cohort_week × 채널 × 지표 4종) 또는 Time series 4개로 분리
판단기준:
avg_orders_d30: 재이용 그룹 2.21회 기준
d30_payment_rate_pct: 68.7% 기준
d30_review_rate_pct: 10.3% 기준
d30_subscription_rate_pct: 6.4% 기준
SQL_쿼리:
WITH all_first_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.user_id,
    DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') AS first_order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul'), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS cohort_week,
    CASE
      WHEN u.signup_referral_channel IN (${referral_channels:singlequote})
      THEN u.signup_referral_channel
      ELSE '전체 평균'
    END AS channel_group
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, id, created_at,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS rn
    FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2`
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND DATE(created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= DATE('${cohort_start_date}')
  ) o
  JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.user` u ON o.user_id = u.id
  WHERE o.rn = 1
    AND u.withdrawal_date IS NULL
),
order_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    afo.cohort_week,
    afo.channel_group,
    afo.first_order_date,
    COUNT(o2.id) AS order_count_d30
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2` o2
    ON afo.user_id = o2.user_id
    AND o2.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
    AND DATE(o2.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY afo.user_id, afo.cohort_week, afo.channel_group, afo.first_order_date
),
payment_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    MAX(CASE
      WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL
       AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
       -- TODO: receipt.status 결제완료 값 확인 후 조건 추가
       -- 확인 쿼리: SELECT DISTINCT status, COUNT(*) FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.receipt` WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY 2 DESC
       AND DATE(r.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
       AND DATE(r.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END) AS has_payment_d30
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_v2` o2
    ON afo.user_id = o2.user_id AND o2.deleted_at IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.order_invoice` oi ON o2.id = oi.order_id
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.invoice` inv ON oi.invoice_id = inv.id
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.receipt` r ON inv.id = r.invoice_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id
),
review_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    MAX(CASE
      WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL
       AND c.deleted_date IS NULL
       AND DATE(c.created_date, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
       AND DATE(c.created_date, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END) AS has_review_d30
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.comment` c ON afo.user_id = c.user_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id
),
subscription_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    afo.user_id,
    MAX(CASE
      WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL
       AND DATE(s.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') >= afo.first_order_date
       AND DATE(s.created_at, 'Asia/Seoul') <= DATE_ADD(afo.first_order_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END) AS subscribed_d30
  FROM all_first_orders afo
  LEFT JOIN `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.subscription` s ON afo.user_id = s.user_id
  GROUP BY afo.user_id
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    om.user_id,
    om.cohort_week,
    om.channel_group,
    om.order_count_d30,
    COALESCE(pm.has_payment_d30, 0) AS has_payment_d30,
    COALESCE(rm.has_review_d30,  0) AS has_review_d30,
    COALESCE(sm.subscribed_d30,  0) AS subscribed_d30
  FROM order_metrics om
  LEFT JOIN payment_metrics      pm ON om.user_id = pm.user_id
  LEFT JOIN review_metrics       rm ON om.user_id = rm.user_id
  LEFT JOIN subscription_metrics sm ON om.user_id = sm.user_id
)
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP(cohort_week)                                             AS time,
  channel_group                                                      AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                                            AS cohort_size,
  ROUND(AVG(order_count_d30), 2)                                     AS avg_orders_d30,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(has_payment_d30 = 1) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1)         AS d30_payment_rate_pct,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(has_review_d30  = 1) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1)         AS d30_review_rate_pct,
  ROUND(COUNTIF(subscribed_d30  = 1) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1)         AS d30_subscription_rate_pct
FROM combined
WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Seoul'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY cohort_week, channel_group
ORDER BY cohort_week DESC, channel_group
개발자_주의사항: [TODO] receipt.status 결제완료 값 확인 필요. 확인 후 payment_metrics CTE의 주석 처리된 AND r.status IN (...) 조건 추가. 코호트 성숙 조건: 30일이 경과한 코호트만 포함.

목적_및_맥락: Panel P5 결제 발생율 쿼리에서 receipt.status의 실제 결제완료 값을 확인 후 조건 추가 필요.
SQL_쿼리:
SELECT DISTINCT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM `covering-app-ccd23.secure_dataset.receipt`
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY cnt DESC
개발자_주의사항: 확인된 값(예: SUCCESS / PAID / COMPLETED 중 실제 값)으로 payment_metrics CTE 내 주석 해제 후 적용

목적_및_맥락: 모든 쿼리의 ${referral_channels:singlequote} 는 Grafana Multi-value 변수를 SQL IN 절에 맞게 '값1','값2' 형태로 변환하는 포맷. :singlequote 누락 시 SQL 오류 발생.
각 패널은 해당 측정 기간(D+2/7/14/30)이 경과한 코호트만 포함. 미성숙 코호트 포함 시 지표가 낮게 왜곡됨. 각 쿼리 하단 WHERE cohort_week <= DATE_SUB(...) 조건으로 처리됨.
BigQuery DATE 타입을 Grafana가 시계열로 인식하지 못할 수 있음. 모든 쿼리에서 TIMESTAMP(cohort_week) AS time 으로 변환하여 반환. Grafana 패널에서 time 필드를 X축(Time field)으로 지정 필요.
모든 시계열 패널은 선택한 실험군 채널(들) + '전체 평균' 시리즈를 같은 그래프에 함께 표시. CASE WHEN channel IN (...) THEN channel ELSE '전체 평균' END 로 그루핑되어 자동 처리됨.
